text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Apr 26 18:14:12 2014
New Revision: 352333
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352333
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352333/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/188614
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HTMLPrototype/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HTMLPrototype/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HTMLPrototype/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:08 2014	(r352332)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-HTMLPrototype/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:12 2014	(r352333)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Access to the prototype JavaScript library using HTML::Prototype
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-CGI-Application>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application \
 		p5-HTML-Prototype>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTML-Prototype
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
